debug_info.goal:
case a
α β γ δ ι : Type
x y : T
u v : U
⊢ u = v

failed_attempts:
cases (show False from by
      have : u = v := by
        simpa using rfl
      exact False.elim (by cases this))

first
    | simpa using (show u = v from rfl)
    | intro u v; rfl
first | exact rfl | exact (by cases u; cases v; rfl)
first | exact rfl | simpa using (propext Iff.rfl)

first
    | assumption
    | intro u v; rfl

first
    | cases h : (u = v) with
      | refl => rfl
    | cases h : (u = v) with
      | refl => rfl

first
    | simpa using (rfl : u = u)
    | intro u v; simpa using (rfl : u = u)
first | exact rfl | simpa using (show u = u from rfl)

first
    | simpa using (rfl : u = u)
    | intro _ _; rfl

first
    | exact u ▸ rfl
    | simpa using (by rfl : u = u)
simpa using (show u = v from rfl)

· cases (Classical.decEq U) with
      | inl h =>
          have : u = v := h u v
          exact this
      | inr h =>
          exfalso
          exact h (by intro a b; cases (Classical.decEq U) with
            | inl h => exact h a b
            | inr h => exact False.elim (h (rfl)))

have : False := by
      have := u
      cases this
    exact False.elim this

first | cases subsingleton_or_nontrivial U with
    | inl h => exact (Subsingleton.elim _ _)
    | inr h => cases (h u v (by rfl))
